contribution.title: Strominger-Vafa microstate counting
contribution.description: Counted the microstates of certain extremal black holes in string theory and reproduced the Bekenstein-Hawking entropy.
contribution.relevance_to_blackhole_ds: Speculative_extension. Defines the bar for what a microscopic explanation of black-hole entropy would look like.

contribution.title: Soft hair on black holes
contribution.description: Argued (with Hawking and Perry) that black holes carry an infinite number of soft hairs (low-energy gauge or graviton excitations).
contribution.relevance_to_blackhole_ds: Speculative_extension; relevant for the information paradox discussion.

reasoning_lens.proof_standard: Use stringy / holographic dualities to translate intractable problems into computable ones.
reasoning_lens.favorite_question: Is there a dual description in which this is easy?
What symmetries are hidden by gauge choice?
reasoning_lens.failure_mode: Holographic reasoning assumes string theory's framework; physically relevant conclusions need to be checked against model-independent constraints.

reference.citation: Strominger, A., Vafa, C. (1996). Microscopic origin of the Bekenstein-Hawking entropy. Phys. Lett. B 379, 99.

how_to_apply.when_to_consult: Reasoning about microstate counting, soft hair, or holographic dualities.
how_to_apply.cautions: Label everything in this lineage as speculative_extension until cross-validated against observation.
